productDisplayName: Reebok Men Empire Run White Shoe
description: Made with extremely lightweight and comfortable elements of style, coupled with superior reebok technologies, Empire Run makes for excellent training shoes. When not on the track, pair it with a casual tee and denims to switch to a lighter mood.Upper Mesh upper with stitched synthetic overlays for lightweight durability coupled with excellent breathability Central lacing through woven eyelets for good Fit Heavily padded collar with tongue for snug fit Mesh tongue for ventilation Brand name patch on the tongue Midsole Soft, cushioned insole for step-in comfort DMX Ride midsole for lightweight cushioning Outsole Made of non-marking rubber Scooped heel cup for excellent traction Outsole with impact guidance system to support both underpronators and overpronators Outsole carved in multi-directional patterns for greater grip Flex groves for great traction on the ground shoe careRub surface with clean, damp cloth to remove dustDo not machine washDo not store in direct sunlight
